subject: docs(project): add CLAUDE.md and docs/ structure for AI-assisted development
body:
Establishes the documentation framework based on the glow-props CLAUDE.md
template. Creates all referenced doc files so AI assistants have consistent
structure for session continuity, task tracking, and institutional memory.

Source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devmade-ai/glow-props/main/CLAUDE.md

Tags: documentation, setup, scaffolding
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: project-setup
Semver: minor
